notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka reaches on a fielder's choice. Jake Burger scores. Josh Jung to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Justin Sterner.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: Denzel Clarke GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Denzel Clarke grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Josh Smith to first baseman Jake Burger. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Denzel Clarke out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Evan Carter pops out to third baseman Darell Hernaiz in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Evan Carter grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Jacob Wilson. Joc Pederson out at 2nd.
